acceptance_targets: [chapter_03_award_001] Between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:89 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:145, at least one non-Owen speaker must explicitly name a specific immediate implication of the manuscript and Neville must answer that implication; fail if the room's only response modes remain dismissal, jokes, or generic insistence that the theory is not useful tonight.

[chapter_03_craft_001] Across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:89 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:157, each successive exchange must add either new actionable information, a new social cost, or a new tactical consequence. Fail if any two consecutive exchanges do nothing but restate that Owen's theory is unusable tonight.

findings.acceptance_test: Between snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:89 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:145, at least one non-Owen speaker must explicitly name a specific immediate implication of the manuscript and Neville must answer that implication; fail if the room's only response modes remain dismissal, jokes, or generic insistence that the theory is not useful tonight.
findings.problem: The chapter executes the humiliation premise cleanly, but the room only cycles through skepticism, jokes, and managerial refusal. Because nobody briefly reaches for the hope or danger inside Owen's claim, the school-war/cosmic-dread collision stays on a single emotional plane instead of opening into a richer, more prize-level conflict.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework the exchange anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:89, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:105, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:141 so one non-Owen speaker briefly identifies a concrete possible use or concrete new danger in the manuscript that matters tonight, forcing Neville's refusal to cut off a live temptation rather than dismiss a merely abstract theory.

findings.acceptance_test: Across snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:89 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:157, each successive exchange must add either new actionable information, a new social cost, or a new tactical consequence. Fail if any two consecutive exchanges do nothing but restate that Owen's theory is unusable tonight.
findings.problem: Once Neville asks what the manuscript can do tonight, the scene proves the same point too many times. Owen cannot make it actionable, then Dean, Seamus, Martha, and Neville each restate that unusability, which softens escalation before Prue's entry.
findings.rewrite_direction: Tighten or redistribute the beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:89, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:97, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:113, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:145, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_03.md:157. Keep only one skeptical echo after Neville's first practical question, then spend the recovered space on a new cost or turn such as Owen disclosing the service run earlier, the burn in his palm becoming visible, or Martha's anger sharpening into a more specific relational wound.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Preserve productive dialogue roughness; do not clean living speech into balanced thesis statements.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Prioritize structural and craft blockers first: causality, chapter architecture, stakes clarity, continuity logic, and all HIGH/CRITICAL defects.
revision_pass.label: HIGH/CRITICAL structural/craft fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the premise's sharpest contradiction: school-year comedy, adolescent awkwardness, punitive cruelty, and cosmic dread may coexist in the same novel without canceling each other. When a scene offers a cleaner version and a truer version, choose the truer one unless the character is actively refusing perception on the page.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If pain, cruelty, fear, or moral ugliness would leave a bodily or environmental trace, render that trace instead of summarizing it into tasteful haze.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High. Contractions are the spoken norm for most characters; fuller forms are reserved for Snape, ritual language, or deliberate emphasis.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate scene density, dialogue load, and movement mode aggressively: confrontation against quiet meals, subterranean revelation against corridor farce, ritual compression against spring drift, so no consecutive chapters feel built from the same emotional or structural template.
prose_style_profile.diction: British boarding-school realism under wartime pressure, with speculative vocabulary introduced only when Owen's attention earns it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third limited through Owen, with only brief sensory widenings that he could plausibly notice in the moment.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate analytic accumulation with blunt corporeal sentences. Quiet chapters should breathe; punishment and ritual chapters should tighten without clipping grammar.
